title: デビュー戦の後に・ビッグな新人

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And coming through with flying colors in her
debut race is—

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Wow! Bono was sooo cool out there!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, I couldn't take my eyes off her! I've
never seen someone so big run so fast!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
No kidding! She has presence and power in
spades! I can't wait to see what's next in store for
her!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Wow... There are so many smiling faces
everywhere!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
choice_data_list: Welcome back. Good work out there!
Welcome back. Good work out there!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Everyone from the stands was smiling at me after
the race. It felt so nice...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I want to make even more people smile! I want to
make it so the audience feels as warm as if they
just finished playing tag!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: And for that, there's only one thing I have to do.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I need to get so buono at racing that everyone
smiles when they watch me...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And make it so the stands fill up with more and
more people!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Now that that's settled, I'm gonna whip up lots of
food! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her exclamation comes off as a non sequitur to
me, but I'm sure Hishi Akebono has a reason for
making such a declaration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whatever the case, if she wants to electrify the
stadium, then we're going to need to draw in
more fans first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now it's just a matter of keeping up with training
and figuring out how to get her name out at the
same time!
